# Swael

> An open-source framework for composing, running, and growing multi-agent AI swarms. Topology is data (YAML/JSON); skills are the universal extension primitive; governance is built in via Microsoft AGT; swarms grow by observing their own capability gaps and authoring new skills through conversation with human approval at every step.

**Status:** v1.0 shipped. CLI, HTTP server, 7 model providers, MCP integration, Knowledge MCP Server, observability, Docker sandbox, 2 reference topologies, 20 skills, 16 archetypes, 500+ tests.

## Start here

- [README](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/README.md): project overview, what works today, milestone progress.
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): repo-wide invariants, feature-delivery workflow, release checklist.
- [Swael Design v0.6](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/Swael-Design-v0.6.md): the authoritative architecture. §5 (Core Concepts), §6 (Skills), §8 (Separation of Powers), §14 (Runtime), §18 (MCP Integration).
- [Implementation plan](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md): all milestones complete.
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): v1.0 release notes.

## CLI commands

`validate`, `run` (with `--verbose`, `--dry-run`), `init`, `author` (with `--thorough`), `edit`, `serve`, `status`, `logs` (with `--format markdown`), `why`, `ask`, `knowledge-pack`, `knowledge-server`, `review list/show/approve/reject`, `gaps`.

## Schemas

Five canonical artifact schemas (JSON Schema 2020-12):

- [topology.schema.json](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/packages/schema/schemas/topology.schema.json)
- [skill.schema.json](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/packages/schema/schemas/skill.schema.json)
- [archetype.schema.json](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/packages/schema/schemas/archetype.schema.json)
- [workspace.schema.json](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/packages/schema/schemas/workspace.schema.json)
- [trigger.schema.json](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/packages/schema/schemas/trigger.schema.json)

## Reference workspace

Production-quality topologies, archetypes, and skills under `reference/`:

- [Code Review Swarm topology](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/reference/topologies/code-review.yaml): 3 leaders (Engineering, QA, Ops), 10 agents.
- [Skill Authoring Swarm topology](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/reference/topologies/skill-authoring.yaml): 6 specialist agents.
- [20 reference skills](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/tree/main/reference/skills): GitHub MCP, decision, knowledge, coordination, persistence.
- [16 archetypes](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/tree/main/reference/archetypes): leaders, code review workers, authoring agents.

## Design notes

Per-feature design notes under `design/details/`:

- [MCP client](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/mcp-client.md): stdio + HTTP transports, workspace config, governance gating, inputSchema forwarding.
- [Knowledge MCP Server](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/knowledge-mcp-server.md): 11 tools for live docs search.
- [User Knowledge Server](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/user-knowledge-server.md): bootstrap-time knowledge wiring for user codebases.
- [Code Review Swarm](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/topology-code-review.md): agent tree, skill map, HITL gates.
- [Skill Authoring Swarm](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/topology-skill-authoring.md): multi-agent authoring + edit mode.
- [Governance provider](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/governance-provider-interface.md): AGT integration, policy evaluation, audit.
- [Model provider](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/model-provider-abstraction.md): 7 built-in providers, per-agent model selection.
- [Conversational authoring](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/conversational-authoring.md): swael init/author/edit.
- [Structured output](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/structured-output-governance.md): schema-constrained generation + auto-correction.
- [LangGraph compiler](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/design/details/langgraph-compiler.md): topology → StateGraph translation.

## Guides

- [Sterling OMS workspace](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/docs/guides/sterling-oms-workspace.md): building domain-specific agent workspaces with knowledge bases.
- [Model selection](https://github.com/delivstat/swael/blob/main/docs/guides/model-selection.md): pricing comparison, per-agent config, env vars.
